categories.title: Apologetics & Evidence
categories.description: Resources that help you understand why Christianity is true and how to defend your faith.

resources.title: Mere Christianity
resources.author: C.S. Lewis
resources.description: A classic defense of the Christian faith. Lewis argues from reason and logic for the existence of God and the truth of Christianity.

resources.title: The Case for Christ
resources.author: Lee Strobel
resources.description: A former atheist investigates the historical evidence for Jesus and the resurrection. Accessible and compelling.

resources.title: Reasonable Faith
resources.author: Dr. William Lane Craig
resources.description: One of the leading Christian apologists today. Articles, videos, and debates on the evidence for God and the resurrection.

resources.title: Unbelievable? Podcast
resources.author: Premier Christian Radio
resources.description: Debates and discussions between Christians and skeptics on the biggest questions of faith. Great for hearing both sides.

categories.title: Bible Study Tools
categories.description: Tools to help you dig deeper into Scripture and understand the Word of God.

resources.title: Blue Letter Bible
resources.description: Excellent free resource with original Hebrew and Greek word studies, commentaries, and multiple translations side-by-side.

resources.title: Bible Gateway
resources.description: Easy-to-use Bible search with dozens of translations, reading plans, and audio Bibles. Great for daily reading.

resources.title: How to Read the Bible for All Its Worth
resources.author: Gordon D. Fee & Douglas Stuart
resources.description: An essential guide to understanding different genres of Scripture — from poetry to prophecy to epistles — and interpreting them correctly.

resources.title: YouVersion Bible App
resources.description: Free Bible app with hundreds of reading plans, audio Bibles, and community features. Available on iOS and Android.

categories.title: Theology & Doctrine
categories.description: Resources that help you understand the core teachings of Christianity.

resources.title: Knowing God
resources.author: J.I. Packer
resources.description: A modern classic that explores the nature and character of God — deeply theological yet accessible and worshipful.

resources.title: Systematic Theology
resources.author: Wayne Grudem
resources.description: A comprehensive overview of Christian doctrine, organized systematically and rooted in Scripture. Great for reference.

resources.title: The Gospel Coalition
resources.description: Articles, essays, and podcasts from a wide range of Reformed theologians and pastors. Great for digging deeper into theology.

resources.title: RZIM Podcast
resources.author: Ravi Zacharias International Ministries
resources.description: World-class apologetics and theological teaching. Engaging talks that connect faith with real life.

categories.title: Community & Growth
categories.description: Resources to help you grow in community and live out your faith.

resources.title: The Meaning of Marriage
resources.author: Timothy Keller
resources.description: A gospel-centered look at marriage, singleness, and relationships. Applicable for everyone, not just married couples.

resources.title: Desiring God
resources.author: John Piper
resources.description: Resources focused on Christian hedonism — finding joy in God. Articles, sermons, and books for spiritual growth.

resources.title: Ask Pastor John
resources.author: John Piper
resources.description: John Piper answers listener questions about theology, life, and faith. Practical and deeply biblical.

resources.title: PrayerMate
resources.description: A beautiful prayer journal app that helps you organize and remember prayer requests. Great for personal and group prayer.

categories.title: Why We Believe Series
categories.description: Our own teaching series on the evidence and reasons for the Christian faith.

resources.title: Why We Believe: The Reliability of Scripture
resources.description: Exploring the historical reliability, manuscript evidence, and divine inspiration of the Bible.

resources.title: Why We Believe: The Resurrection
resources.description: Examining the historical evidence for the resurrection of Jesus Christ.

resources.title: Why We Believe: The Problem of Evil
resources.description: Addressing one of the most challenging questions: If God is good, why does evil exist?

resources.title: Why We Believe: The Case for God's Existence
resources.description: Exploring the philosophical and scientific arguments for God's existence.
